opensearchservice.domain.windowstarttime: A custom start time for the off-peak window, in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC). The window length will always be 10 hours, so you can't specify an end time. For example, if you specify 11:00 P.M. UTC as a start time, the end time will automatically be set to 9:00 A.M.

opensearchservice.domain.windowstarttime.Description: The start hour of the window in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), using 24-hour time. For example, 17 refers to 5:00 P.M. UTC. The minimum value is 0 and the maximum value is 23.
The start minute of the window, in UTC. The minimum value is 0 and the maximum value is 59.
